Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.464

Title: Relates to increasing certain special accidental death benefits paid to widows and orphaned children of members
Summary: Increases certain special accidental death benefits paid to a widow or widower or the children of a deceased member of the state and local retirement system.
LawCode: Amd §208-f, Gen Muni L; amd §361-a, R & SS L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law and the retirement and social security law, in relation to increasing the special accidental death benefit of certain deceased members
